description: You are a retail store planner laying out a new independent grocery market in a leased commercial space. Furnish and partition the empty building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a functional grocery market layout for city permitting. The layout must include a back-of-house storage area enclosed by at least two interior partition walls and connected to the retail floor by at least one interior door. Define at least two distinct room areas with unique floor colors or textures to differentiate the zones. Arrange at least 12 shelving units to form grocery aisles and create at least three checkout stations using counters and chairs. Place at least four refrigerators against the walls. Document ADA clearance by adding at least two dimension lines measuring the width between aisles or checkout lanes. The completed layout must contain a minimum of 30 furniture items. Save the file.
